TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Shau Jing Teng == u siwkay niza Shau Jing Teng(1987.3.30) ,tatama, u palway nu Taywan. nalecu' i Kalingku Fengpin. tabaki i Taybak. 2007 a mihca, tayza madademec ciniza ku mudadiway a demec. maala tu kawlah. 2008 a mihca, tahkal tu ku dadiw niza. 2011 a mihca, mapalaw tu iga ciniza. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2011 . u sulit nu Amilika Jam Hsiao (traditional Chinese: Ťē≠śē¨ť®į; simplified Chinese: Ťźßśē¨ŤÖĺ; pinyin: XińĀo J√¨ngt√©ng; Wade‚ÄďGiles: Hsiao Ching-teng, born 30 March 1987) is a Taiwanese singer and actor. At the age of 17, while still in high school, he began working as a restaurant singer. In May 2007, Hsiao took part in the first season of China Television (CTV)'s star search show, One Million Star. He was a challenger on that show and instantly rose to fame with his wide vocal ranges and unique singing style. His diverse music genres and charisma quickly captured the attention of the Taiwanese media and music industry. He signed a contract with Warner Music Taiwan in 2008 and released his debut album, Jam Hsiao, in the same year. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == sńßau *iŇč t…ôŇč == u siwkaj niza sńßau *iŇč t…ôŇč(****.*.**) ,tatama, u par~…ĺwaj nu tajwan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶u Ē~ ° i kar~…ĺiŇčku f…ôŇčpin. tabaki i tajbak. **** a mińß ¶a, tajza madad…ôm…ô ¶ ¶iniza ku mudadiwaj a d…ôm…ô ¶. maar~…ĺa tu kawr~…ĺańß. **** a mińß ¶a, tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku dadiw niza. **** a mińß ¶a, mapar~…ĺaw tu iga ¶iniza. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika *am ńßsiao (traditionar~…ĺ ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; simpr~…ĺifi…ôd ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: *i*o **Ňčt*Ňč; wad…ô*gir~…ĺ…ôs: ńßsiao ¶ńßiŇč-t…ôŇč, born ** mar ¶ńß ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô siŇč…ôr and a ¶tor. at tńß…ô ag…ô of **, wńßir~…ĺ…ô stir~…ĺr~…ĺ in ńßigńß s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ, ńß…ô b…ôgan workiŇč as a r…ôstaurant siŇč…ôr. in maj ****, ńßsiao took part in tńß…ô first s…ôason of ¶ńßina t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision ( ¶t*) Ē~ °s star s…ôar ¶ńß sńßow, on…ô mir~…ĺr~…ĺion star. ńß…ô was a ¶ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôr on tńßat sńßow and instantr~…ĺj ros…ô to fam…ô witńß ńßis wid…ô *o ¶ar~…ĺ raŇč…ôs and uni*u…ô siŇčiŇč stjr~…ĺ…ô. ńßis di*…ôrs…ô musi ¶ g…ônr…ôs and ¶ńßarisma *ui ¶kr~…ĺj ¶aptur…ôd tńß…ô att…ôntion of tńß…ô taiwan…ôs…ô m…ôdia and musi ¶ industrj. ńß…ô sign…ôd a ¶ontra ¶t witńß warn…ôr musi ¶ taiwan in **** and r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd ńßis d…ôbut ar~…ĺbum, *am ńßsiao, in tńß…ô sam…ô j…ôar. u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Shau Jing Teng == u siwkay niza Shau Jing Teng(1987.3.30) ,tatama, u palway nu Taywan. nalecu' i Kalingku Fengpin. tabaki i Taybak. 2007 a mihca, tayza madademec ciniza ku mudadiway a demec. maala tu kawlah. 2008 a mihca, tahkal tu ku dadiw niza. 2011 a mihca, mapalaw tu iga ciniza. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2011 . u sulit nu Amilika Jam Hsiao (traditional Chinese: Ťē≠śē¨ť®į; simplified Chinese: Ťźßśē¨ŤÖĺ; pinyin: XińĀo J√¨ngt√©ng; Wade‚ÄďGiles: Hsiao Ching-teng, born 30 March 1987) is a Taiwanese singer and actor. At the age of 17, while still in high school, he began working as a restaurant singer. In May 2007, Hsiao took part in the first season of China Television (CTV)'s star search show, One Million Star. He was a challenger on that show and instantly rose to fame with his wide vocal ranges and unique singing style. His diverse music genres and charisma quickly captured the attention of the Taiwanese media and music industry. He signed a contract with Warner Music Taiwan in 2008 and released his debut album, Jam Hsiao, in the same year. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
